channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Heard kids saying ‘6-7’? It’s so annoying that schools are banning it
item.description: The teaching profession requires a certain degree of patience. Particularly when students discover a new trend to latch onto and repeat at every given opportunity. The latest so-called “brain rot” phrase to flood the classroom: “6-7.
item.dc:creator: Eve Upton-Clark, Fast Company

item.title: Valve's Steam Deck inspired VR headset might be launching soon –here's what we know
item.description: There's lots of buzz around a potential Steam Frame VR headset launch. Here's what we know about the mysterious device.
item.dc:creator: Hamish Hector, TechRadar

item.title: TSA CIO, State senior procurement executive moving on
item.description: Yemi Oshinnaiye, the Transportation Security Administration’s CIO, is returning to industry after more than three years leading the agency’s technology office. The post TSA CIO, State senior procurement executive moving on first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jason Miller, Federal News Network

item.title: Microsoft just got its hands on 100,000 Nvidia GB300 chips - and all it took was investing $33 billion in these startups
item.description: Microsoft’s $33 billion investment in neocloud providers secures Nvidia GPUs, expands compute access, and raises new antitrust and energy concerns.
item.dc:creator: Efosa Udinmwen, TechRadar

item.title: Lyft scraps feature that let drivers see how often riders tip
item.description: Lyft has scrapped a test feature that showed some drivers how often passengers tip before accepting a ride.
item.dc:creator: Andrew Dorn, The Hill

item.title: How to watch Belgium vs North Macedonia for *FREE*
item.description: Here's our quick guide on how to watch Belgium vs North Macedonia for *FREE* in the UEFA World Cup 2026 Qualifiers.
item.dc:creator: Jacob Jones, TechRadar

item.title: Lyft plans fleet of hundreds of Tensor Robocars from 2027
item.description: Lyft Inc. is partnering with autonomous vehicle developer Tensor Auto Inc. to deploy a fleet of hundreds of robotaxis in Europe and North America starting in 2027.
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg, The Mercury News

item.title: Intel: Latest news and insights
item.description: More processor coverage on Network World: AMD news and insights | Nvidia news and insights Intel is hoping for a turnaround under its new CEO, Lip-BuTan. Intel’s Q1 2025 revenue was $12.7 billion, flat year-over-year.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Battlefield 6 release time - here's when you'll be able to preload and play Battlefield 6 in your timezone
item.description: Here's the Battlefield 6 release time for your timezone. This includes information on preloading, and details on exactly when you can jump into the game.
item.dc:creator: Jake Green, TechRadar

item.title: G+D y sus socios Nexi y Capgemini desarrollarán la solución “offline“ del euro digital
item.description: El Banco Central Europeo (BCE) ha adjudicado a la alianza empresarial liderada por Giesecke+Devrient junto al proveedor de servicios de pago Nexi y Capgemini el desarrollo de una solución integral que permita a usuarios y comercios de toda Europa realizar pagos con el euro digital en modo offline.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: UK watchdog targets Google's 'strategic' role in search ads and a competitive market
item.description: Britain’s antitrust watchdog is labeling Google a “strategic” player in the online search advertising market, paving the way for regulators to force the company to change its business practices to ensure more competition in that market.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Many managers say they trust AI agents more than junior workers
item.description: Many managers believe AI could replace junior workers; many workers believe AI could replace managers.
item.dc:creator: Craig Hale, TechRadar

item.title: Too many junk calls to your iPhone? Try Apple’s new iOS 26 call screen feature
item.description: iPhone users have a new tool to combat the scourge of nuisance phone calls: a virtual gatekeeper that can screen incoming calls from unknown numbers. It’s among the bevy of new features that Apple rolled out with last month’s release of iOS 26.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: Quantum computing – it’s still confusing, but now it’s mission-critical
item.description: "You're basically creating molecular circuits in the machine's memory versus connecting together a bunch of steps in a piece of software," said Bill Vass. The post Quantum computing – it’s still confusing, but now it’s mission-critical first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Terry Gerton, Federal News Network

item.title: Princess of Wales suggests parents should put down the phone to combat social discontent
item.description: LONDON (AP) — The Princess of Wales has a suggestion for parents: Please put down the phone. Kate, as she is commonly known, collaborated with adult development researcher Robert Waldinger to warn that technology is contributing to an epidemic of disconnection that is hurting family relationships.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Gemini Enterprise is Google’s new ‘front door’ for agentic AI access at work
item.description: Google has introduced a new AI assistant to serve as a platform so users can access and coordinate agents that automate work tasks.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Cyber Leaders Exchange 2025: Splunk’s Bart Larango on why mission success hinges on a unified data strategy
item.description: Without a unified data strategy, agencies struggle to act fast, says the federal Splunk advisor. The post Cyber Leaders Exchange 2025: Splunk’s Bart Larango on why mission success hinges on a unified data strategy first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Anastasia Obis, Federal News Network

item.title: Unpacking the Microsoft Agent Framework
item.description: Earlier this year, Microsoft said it would bring its two different agent development platforms together, merging Semantic Kernel and AutoGen. It has now launched that merged platform as the Microsoft Agent Framework.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Greenland's leader hails EU as trusted friend and urges investment in its minerals
item.description: BRUSSELS (AP) — Greenland’s leader on Wednesday thanked the European Union for being “a trusted friend” and urged the 27-nation bloc to invest in his country’s mineral resources, renewable energy, airports and internet services.
item.dc:creator: LORNE COOK, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Elon Musk agrees to settle with fired Twitter execs over severance dispute
item.description: Elon Musk and X have reached a settlement with a group of executives over $128 million in severance that they allege Musk had not paid since he bought what was then known as Twitter in 2022.
item.dc:creator: CNN.com Wire Service, The Mercury News

item.title: UC Santa Barbara develops new soft robotic system for emergency intubation procedures
item.description: UC Santa Barbara researchers developed a soft robotic intubation system that achieved 100% success rates for experts and 96% for paramedics with minimal training.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trump's $100,000 H-1B visa fee threatens rural schools and hospitals reliant on immigrant workers
item.description: The new $100,000 fee for H-1B visas spells trouble for rural parts of the U.S. that rely on immigrants to fill vacancies in skilled professions.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Raza, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Deloitte’s AI governance failure exposes critical gap in enterprise quality controls
item.description: A breakdown in AI governance at Deloitte Australia has forced the consulting giant to refund part of an AU$440,000 (US$290,000) government contract after AI-generated fabrications were included in a final report, exposing vulnerabilities that analysts said are symptomatic of broader challenges as en
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Nobel Prize in chemistry goes to discovery that could trap C02 and bring water to deserts
item.description: Three scientists have won the Nobel Prize in chemistry for their development of new molecular structures that can trap vast quantities of gas inside.
item.dc:creator: Kostya Manenkov And Stefanie Dazio, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Sanders: AI may take 100 million jobs in the next 10 years
item.description: Bernie Sanders says in a new ChatGPT-assisted report released Monday that AI and automation could eliminate nearly 100 million jobs over the next decade. Titled “Big Tech Oligarchs’ War Against Workers: AI and Automation Could Destroy Nearly 100 Million U.
item.dc:creator: Mark Sullivan, Fast Company

item.title: Snapchat users are going to have to pay to keep their memories
item.description: First came the burning of the Library of Alexandria. Then came the news that Snapchat is constructing a paywall around Memories. The company announced last week that it is capping users’ free Memories storage at 5 gigabytes (GB).
item.dc:creator: Eve Upton-Clark, Fast Company

item.title: JetBrains Amper build tool adds Compose Hot Reload
item.description: JetBrains has released Amper 0.8.0, an update to the build tool for Java and Kotlin that adds support for Compose Hot Reload. Amper 0.8.0 also adds support for custom Kotlin compiler versions and for JavaScript and WebAssembly (Wasm) targets.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Tesla offers cheaper versions of 2 electric vehicles in bid to win back market share in tough year
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Tesla rolled out new, cheaper versions of two of its electric car models on Tuesday in hopes the offerings will help revive flagging sales but investors dumped its stock anyway.
item.dc:creator: BERNARD CONDON, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Kentucky lawsuit says Roblox fails to protect children on its popular online gaming platform
item.description: FRANKFORT, Ky. (AP) — Kentucky's attorney general claimed Tuesday that the online gaming platform Roblox has become a “playground for predators” as he announced a lawsuit accusing the company of lax child safety measures.
item.dc:creator: BRUCE SCHREINER, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Nearly 100M jobs could be lost to AI, automation, Sanders warns
item.description: Here's which jobs are most at risk of being replaced by AI and automation, according to a new Senate report.
item.dc:creator: Andrew Dorn, NewsNation

item.title: Jamf gets into AI, APIs, and advanced DDM
item.description: IT services are changing. Their future will be defined by extensibility via APIs and artificial intelligence. It appears we’re moving toward a post-app digital economy, where personalization takes precedence over off-the shelf solutions.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Jeep and Chrysler parent Stellantis confirms data breach
item.description: Automotive giant Stellantis becomes latest victim of widespread Salesforce breaches affecting companies like Google, Cisco and Adidas this year.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Deloitte to partially refund Australian government for report with apparent AI-generated errors
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — Deloitte Australia will partially refund the 440,000 Australian dollars ($290,000) paid by the Australian government for a report that was littered with apparent AI-generated errors, including a fabricated quote from a federal court judgment and references to nonexistent
item.dc:creator: ROD McGUIRK, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Google's Play Store shake-up looms after Supreme Court refuses to delay overhaul of the monopoly
item.description: The U.S. Supreme Court on Monday refused to protect Google from a year-old order requiring a major makeover of its Android app store that's designed to unleash more competition against a system that a jury declared an illegal monopoly.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL LIEDTKE, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: OpenAI and chipmaker AMD sign chip supply partnership for AI infrastructure
item.description: Semiconductor maker AMD will supply its chips to artificial intelligence company OpenAI as part of an agreement to team up on building AI infrastructure, the companies said Monday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: How a single MacBook compromise spread across a user’s Apple devices
item.description: Expert cybersecurity tips help Mac owners remove malware infections and strengthen defenses with antivirus software, password managers and system updates.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
